_instructions: This is your XcelerateAI bootcamp roadmap template. Edit this file with your real bootcamp content, then upload it in the Import Roadmap page of the app. Delete this _instructions field before importing.

months.title: JavaScript Foundations
months.objective: Build core programming confidence from zero.

weeks.title: Setup and First Lines of Code
weeks.briefing: Prepare your development environment and write your first JavaScript programs.
fullMission: Install VS Code and configure it
Install Node.js and verify it works
Watch the MDN JavaScript intro video
Push your first file to GitHub

resources.title: MDN JavaScript First Steps
resources.whatToExpect: A beginner-friendly introduction to JavaScript with clear explanations.
resources.missionObjective: Understand what JavaScript is and how to write your first lines of code.

weeks.checkpoint: Can I run a JavaScript file on my laptop and see output in the terminal?
weeks.deliverable: A working hello.js pushed to a GitHub repository called 'xcelerate-js-foundations'.

projects.name: Your First Project
projects.description: A brief description of what this project is and what it demonstrates.

checkpoints.question: Can I explain what a variable is and create one?
